sessions.intent: Design ISettings pattern — strongly typed, per-module, goal-scoped settings with source generator support

before.assumptions: Data.Envelope.cs on data-envelope-architecture branch has hardcoded 100MB gzip bomb limit. No settings mechanism exists in Runtime2 for action/module configuration.
before.risk: New pattern touching source generator, context scoping, engine navigation, and builder discovery. Broad surface but well-contained design.

sessions.plan: ISettings design: each module declares a strongly typed settings class implementing ISettings. Source generator produces scope-aware property bodies (read), settings action handler (write), and builder registry. Settings are goal-scoped with Default flag for engine persistence. Navigation: engine.Module<Archive>().Settings.Max. First use case: replace hardcoded gzip bomb limit.

actions.context: Full design spec for ISettings pattern — phases, scoping, source generator, open questions for coder

after.status: Design complete, ready for coder handoff
after.health: Clean — no code changes, design only
after.notes: Builder integration (discovery action, LLM prompt design) deferred. Depends on data-envelope-architecture branch for Data.Envelope.cs and Module<T> pattern.
